results.title: Galaxy Backbone unveils new identity
results.description: Galaxy Backbone (GBB) has unveiled a new corporate identity, signalling what the organisation described as a new phase of growth and readiness to support the future of digital governance in Nigeria. The unveiling of the identity was part of activities marking 20 years of providing critical digital infrastructure and services to government institutions. According to GBB, the rebranding signals the organisation’s strategic evolution from a core government ICT infrastructure provider to [...] The post Galaxy Backbone unveils new identity appeared first on Tribune Online .

results.title: Skyword survey reveals AI trust gap as consumers turn to third-party validation
results.description: Skyword's latest survey reveals why visibility in AI search is no longer enough to earn consumer trust.
